overall.description: A foggy nighttime drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city highway. The camera moves steadily along a wet multi-lane road beneath massive overpass structures, illuminated by streetlights and neon digital billboards. The scene features heavy atmospheric fog with teal-green lighting, characteristic of the Cyberpunk 2077 game engine.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway beneath massive concrete overpass

events.description: vehicle with red tail lights visible driving ahead in the fog

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the wet highway under the overpass structure, maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead with red tail lights visible through the fog

entered.detail: massive dark concrete highway overpass structure spanning the road
large illuminated advertisement screen showing a woman's face
concrete barrier with metal rail running along the right side of the road
tall street light illuminating the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: Driving along a foggy elevated highway beneath massive concrete overpass structures. Digital billboards line the left side while a guardrail runs along the right. The wet asphalt reflects the artificial street lighting, and sparse vehicle traffic is visible ahead through the thick fog.

events.description: highway direction signs indicating Watson become visible overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive under the overpass system, approaching directional signage

entered.detail: overhead directional signs with white text indicating Watson and other destinations
illuminated advertisement showing a portrait of a person

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the overpass system, large highway direction signs indicating Watson appear overhead. The digital billboards on the left change to display different advertisements as the vehicle progresses through the foggy corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway corridor with large overhead advertising

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the large overhead billboard
camera returns to forward driving position

agents.ego_description: driving beneath the large billboard while briefly looking up at it, then returning gaze to the road

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the left side of the highway

entered.detail: massive red illuminated billboard mounted on the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath a massive red overhead billboard mounted on the overpass. The camera briefly tilts upward to view the billboard before returning to the forward position. A black sedan overtakes on the left side of the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with panoramic cityscape view

events.description: camera pans right to reveal the dense city skyline and neon-lit buildings

agents.ego_description: slowing or stopping while panning the camera to observe the cityscape on the right

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings
tall buildings illuminated with various colored neon signs and window lights
multiple large digital screens and neon advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The camera pans sharply to the right, revealing a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape with towering skyscrapers illuminated by neon signs and advertisements. The highway guardrail remains in the foreground while the dense urban architecture fills the background, showcasing the vertical density of the futuristic city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a claustrophobic, foggy highway corridor that eventually opens up to reveal a sprawling neon metropolis. It begins beneath massive concrete overpasses where wet asphalt reflects artificial street lighting and digital billboards flicker through a thick haze. As the camera progresses, the scene shifts past overhead direction signs for Watson and changing advertisements before tilting upward to glimpse a massive red billboard mounted on the structure above. A black sedan then overtakes the vehicle on the left, leading into a sharp pan to the right that breaks away from the highway guardrail. The view finally expands to showcase a dense cyberpunk cityscape, where towering skyscrapers and vibrant neon signs replace the foggy tunnel of the overpass.
